meaning: adj.[医] 正常血压的n.血压正常的人
examples: Method: 48 aged patients with hypertension and 40 aged normotensive controls exercised on a treadmill.
Early and rapid fluid resuscitation should be administered even in the pregnant patient who is normotensive.
Because of the diabetes mechanism regarding microcirculation impairment even at the normotensive level we may see symptoms.
